source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ FDA/참조 문서/1. Risk Management/3. Product Requirement Specification Report (Doc. No. PRS-01, Rev.0).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Product requirement specification document defining performance, safety, effectiveness, electrical, service-life, safety, EMC, environmental, and labeling requirements for a placeholder medical device model.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to specify product requirements and provide implementation and validation evidence for risk management files according to IEC 60601-1 3.1 Ed.
keyPoints: The scope is to specify product requirement specification of the model to make risk management files according to IEC60601-1 3.1 Ed.
The document states its contents are implementation and validation evidence of the risk management process and are matched to each item of the FMEA table.
The expected service life is approximately 8 years.
The device shall comply with standards and regulations related to EMC.
Operating conditions are 10°C to 35°C, 80%RH, and 70kPa to 110kPa.

evidence.claim: The project scope is to specify product requirements for risk management files according to IEC60601-1 3.1 Ed.
evidence.evidenceText: The scope of this project is to specify product requirement specification of 모델명 to make risk management files according to IEC60601-1 3.1 Ed.

evidence.claim: The document content is implementation and validation evidence of the risk management process matched to FMEA items.
evidence.evidenceText: A contents of this document is an implementation and validation evidence of risk management process, also, matched to each item of FMEA table of risk management report.

evidence.claim: The document references Medical Device Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical Device Regulation (EU) 2017/745 of the European Parliament and of the council.

evidence.evidenceText: EN ISO 14971[2012] Medical devices – Application of risk management to medical devices

evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60601-1[2005] +A1 [2012] Medical electrical equipment Part 1: General requirement for basic safety and essential performance

evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62366 [2007] Application of usability engineering to medical devices

evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62304 [2006] Medical device software life-cycle process

evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62220-1-1 [2015] Medical electrical equipment - Characteristics of digital X-ray imaging devices - Part 1-1: Determination of the detective quantum efficiency – Detectors used in radiographic imaging

evidence.evidenceText: MEDDEV 2.7.1 Rev.4 Clinical Evaluation

evidence.claim: The control box power specification includes AC input 100 to 240 VAC, 50 to 60 Hz, and 24 VDC output.
evidence.evidenceText: AC Input, DC Output Voltage of Control Box ... Input Voltage 100 220 240 VAC ... Input Frequency 50 - 60 Hz ... Output Voltage - 24 - VDC

evidence.claim: Power consumption is listed as 27.5 typical with battery recharging and operation.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Consumption: 27.5 Typical with Battery recharging and Operation.

evidence.claim: The battery charger adapter specification includes input 100 to 240 VAC, 50 to 60 Hz, and output 18.05 to 19.95 VDC.
evidence.evidenceText: Battery Recharger Adapter ... Input Voltage 100 220 240 VAC ... Input Frequency 50 - 60 Hz ... Output Voltage 18.05 19 19.95 VDC

evidence.claim: Battery charging time is specified as 5 hours at minimum RSOC 90%.
evidence.evidenceText: Battery charger specification ... Charging time - 5 - hr Min RSOC: 90％

evidence.claim: Battery protection includes C-FET and D-FET on/off as first protection and fuse as second protection.
evidence.evidenceText: Battery Protection 1st Protection by C-FET and D-FET on/off ... 2nd Protection by Fuse (Not recovered. Permanent Failure)

evidence.claim: Battery certification is planned for K62133 and IEC62133 on MP.
evidence.evidenceText: Battery label and certification : K62133 (Korea) and IEC62133 (Europe) certification will be ready on MP.

evidence.claim: The expected service life is approximately 8 years.
evidence.evidenceText: The 모델명 is designed for a service life of approximately 8 years.

evidence.claim: Expected service life calculation uses fan lifetime of 30,000 hours and a reliability factor of 1.3.
evidence.evidenceText: Part life: According to the data sheet of Fan <Life time = until 30,000 hours> ... Reliability factor = 1.3 ... Life time = 30,000 / (2,880*1.3) = 8.01 years

evidence.claim: No simultaneous independent fault combinations were found during the risk analysis process.
evidence.evidenceText: Note. No combination of simultaneous independent faults has been found during risk analysis process.

evidence.claim: The device does not consider simultaneous faults.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 기기는 동시 고장은 고려하지 않는다.

evidence.claim: Mechanical strength and heat resistance are evaluated by IEC 60601-1 3.1 Ed. tests.
evidence.evidenceText: Test condition에 따라 기계적 강도 시험을 실시하며 이는 IEC 60601-1 3.1 Ed. test로 평가한다.

evidence.claim: Maximum temperature during normal use states no heating device and no thermal regulatory devices.
evidence.evidenceText: Maximum temperature during NORMAL USE ... No heating device No thermal regulatory devices

evidence.claim: Accessible part touch duration is 1s to less than 10s for the power button and charge terminal.
evidence.evidenceText: Accessible part touch duration - Power button: 1s ≤ t < 10s - Charge terminal: 1s ≤ t < 10s

evidence.claim: Accuracy of controls and instruments refers to Essential Performance Report EPR-01.
evidence.evidenceText: Accuracy of controls and instruments (IEC 60601-1 Cl. 12.1) - Refer to Essential Performance Report (Doc. No. EPR-01)

evidence.claim: Indication relevant to safety refers to User Manual UM-01.
evidence.evidenceText: Indication relevant to safety (IEC 60601-1 Cl. 12.4.2) - Refer to User Manual (Doc. No. UM-01)

evidence.claim: Usability refers to Usability Engineering Report UER-01.
evidence.evidenceText: Usability (IEC 60601-1-6, IEC 62366) - Refer to Usability Engineering Report (Doc. No. UER-01)

evidence.claim: The device shall comply with EMC-related standards and regulations.
evidence.evidenceText: The 모델명 shall comply with the standards and regulations related to EMC.

evidence.claim: Operating conditions are 10°C to 35°C, 80%RH, and 70kPa to 110kPa.
evidence.evidenceText: Operating Conditions 1) Temperature: 10°C to 35°C 2) Humidity: 80%RH 3) Atmosphere: 70kPa to 110kPa

evidence.claim: Packaged storage conditions are -20°C to 60°C, 85%RH, and 50kPa to 110kPa.
evidence.evidenceText: Storage Conditions – Packaged ... Temperature: -20°C to 60°C ... Humidity: 85%RH ... Atmosphere: 50kPa to 110kPa

evidence.claim: The labeling symbols include warnings for laser radiation, do not stare into beam, and Class 3R Laser Product.
evidence.evidenceText: Laser Radiation Do not stare into beam Class 3R Laser Product

evidence.claim: The labeling symbols include Type B electrical protection.
evidence.evidenceText: Shows that the electrical protection type is Type B.

reviewFlags.reason: Product name and model name are placeholders in the source text: 제품명 and 모델명; no concrete model was extracted into productModels.
Document dates conflict or are unclear: preparation/review/approval date is 2018.02.10, while revision history for Rev. 0 Draft Established is 2019.02.10.
Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA and sourcePath contains an FDA folder, but the source text mainly cites EU MDR, EN/IEC standards, and MEDDEV; FDA authority is not present in the source text.
Several sections contain template placeholders or instructions to insert diagrams, labels, document numbers, warnings, and methods rather than finalized content.
Some technical values appear incomplete or missing units, such as power consumption listed as '27.5 Typical' without a clear unit.
